info.title: Documents
info.description:
You can use our Invoices API to generate different documents to serve your business needs.

#### Document types
The documents you can generate can be found in the following guide - [Document Types](https://payme.stoplight.io/docs/guides/xjoh69bnd0h24-document-types).

status_code.description: Status of the request (0 - success, 1 - error)

doc_type.description: The documents you can generate can be found in the following guide - [Document Types](https://payme.stoplight.io/docs/guides/xjoh69bnd0h24-document-types).

language.description: Changes the language of the payment IFRAME to English, as well as the error messages. Default value is Hebrew (he)

due_date.description: The date on which a seller expects to receive payment from a buyer

vat_rate.description: The VAT (Value Added Tax) rate applied.

discount.description: The discount rate (percentage) applied to the document

total_paid.description: Total amount paid in this document

total_sum_after_discount.description: Total amount with discount rate included

sum.description: The total amount paid using Cash

cheques.description: The amount paid using a Cheque

bank.description: The bank number - You can check the [list of banks](https://payme.stoplight.io/docs/guides/branches/main/2gxg5v8p1lr0z-list-of-banks) for your convenience.

sum.description: Total amount paid using a bank transfer

date.description: The date the bank transfer was received

sum.description: Total amount paid using a credit card

installments.description: The number of installments for the payment (1 min, 36 max)

first_payment.description: The amount paid in the 1st installment

number.description: If paid without a token, card number is required

cvv.description: Card's CVV (3-number code at the back of the card)

date.description: The date of when the payment was completed

transaction_id.description: The external transaction ID (received from Paypal)

currency.description:
Currency for item #1
Sale currency. [3-letter ISO 4217 name](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217).

doc_type: The doc type field is required.
buyer_name: The buyer name field is required.

doc_type.description: The documents you can generate can be found in the following guide - [Document Types](https://payme.stoplight.io/docs/guides/xjoh69bnd0h24-document-types).

pay_date.description: The date the payment was completed (relevant for doc_type

vat_rate.description: The VAT (Value Added Tax) rate applied

discount.description: The discount rate (percentage) applied to the document

total_sum_after_discount.description: Total amount with discount rate included

total_sum_after_discount - copy.description: Total amount with discount rate included

total_paid.description: Total amount paid in this document

unit_price.description:
The price per unit (1 item)
`unit_price` or `unit_price_with_vat` is required.

currency.description:
Currency for item #1
Sale currency. [3-letter ISO 4217 name](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217).

cheques.description: The amount paid using a Cheque

bank.description: The bank number - You can check the [list of banks](https://payme.stoplight.io/docs/guides/branches/main/2gxg5v8p1lr0z-list-of-banks) for your convenience.

sum.description: The total amount paid using Cash
Total amount paid using a bank transfer

date.description: The date the bank transfer was received
The date of when the payment was completed

transaction_id.description: The external transaction ID (received from Paypal)

sum.description: Total amount paid using a credit card

installments.description: The number of installments for the payment (1 min, 36 max)

first_payment.description: The amount paid in the 1st installment

buyer_key.description: If the invoice is paid using a token, buyer key is required

number.description: If paid without a token, card number is required

cvv.description: Card's CVV (3-number code at the back of the card)

post.description:
## Overview

You can use our Invoices API to generate different documents to serve your business needs.

#### Document types
The documents you can generate can be found in the following guide - [Document Types](https://payme.stoplight.io/docs/guides/xjoh69bnd0h24-document-types).

get.description:
## Overview

In order to query for existing documents, you will need to use the following endpoint and parameters:
 
Environment | URL
---|---
`Staging`| `https://sandbox.payme.io/api/documents?page=0&limit=5&field=createdAt&sort=desc`
`Production` | `https://live.payme.io/api/documents?page=0&limit=5&field=createdAt&sort=desc`

##### Header
Parameter | Description 
---|---
`PayMe-Merchant-Key` | Seller's MPL `DEMOMPL-DEMOMPL-DEMOMPL-DEMOMPL-`

### Request Example:

Item | Description | Example
---|---|---
URL | `https://sandbox.payme.io/api/documents/{document_ID}` |  `INV12321*****`
Header| `seller_payme_id` | `MPLDEMO-MPLDEMO-MPLDEMO-MPLDEMO`

## Overview

In order to query for existing documents, you will need to use the following endpoint and parameters:
 
Environment | URL
---|---
`Staging`| `https://sandbox.payme.io/api/documents?page=0&limit=5&field=createdAt&sort=desc`
`Production` | `https://live.payme.io/api/documents?page=0&limit=5&field=createdAt&sort=desc`

##### Header
Parameter | Description 
---|---
`PayMe-Merchant-Key` | Seller's MPL `MPL15991-38967CJU-GSBK5E1G-XSZ1GZXU`

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: How many pages should be included in the query

parameters.name: field
parameters.description: The dates the query is for
